use_cases: Adding delightful click feedback to interactive demos and landing pages
Creating engaging hero section interactions for SaaS products
Enhancing button or CTA areas with visual wave animations
Building interactive component showcases with satisfying feedback
Adding micro-interactions to any clickable container element
ai_summary: A click-triggered wave animation component that spawns 3 concentric dots emanating outward from the user's click position with staggered delays. Features dark mode support, smooth 2-second animations, and a minimalist card design with border and shadow styling. The effect provides satisfying visual feedback on user interaction.
